summary: Full e2e test of Brevitus Technology (backend + frontend). All 33 backend pytest cases pass after 2 fixes; every listed frontend flow (public site, admission, admin CRUD, homepage/settings, logout) works. Two backend bugs found & fixed by test agent.

minor.issue: [FIXED] _create returned the dict after insert_one(), which motor mutates in-place with ObjectId, causing FastAPI JSON encoder to raise 500. Fixed by popping _id before returning.

[FIXED] Course.slug and Blog.slug were declared as required in models.py, but the handler auto-generates slug from title only after Pydantic validation, so create without explicit slug raised 422 -> 500. Made slug default to '' in models.py.

issues: Password input has no visible border/background in dark theme — cursor is invisible in the empty field. Users may not realise the field is focusable. Consider adding a subtle border or lighter background.

action_items: Consider adding data-testid="login-username" / "login-password" on the admin login inputs for easier automation (currently only login-submit is guaranteed).
Improve visual contrast on admin login password input.
Optional: seed_admin could also seed some real (non-TEST_) leads/blogs for demo purposes.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py _create previously returned the raw dict mutated by insert_one() – a common Motor gotcha. Now fixed via doc.pop('_id').
models.py: Course.slug and Blog.slug should be optional (default '') because the server auto-generates them from title. This is what the spec 'auto-slug generation from title works' expects.
server.py leads listing (/api/admin/leads) returns full docs; consider pagination for scale.
auth.py: single admin, JWT stored in localStorage — acceptable for internal admin, but for production consider httpOnly cookies and rotating secrets.
server.py: CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers will reject; if credentials are actually needed set explicit origins.
seed_data_creation: None persistent — all TEST_ prefixed data created during runs was deleted at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and can be re-run: `pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. All 33 tests pass. Admin login is admin/Brevitus@2026. The public URL is REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Data-testids of note: hero-heading (input) on HomepageAdmin (not hero-heading-input). login form uses generic input selectors — plain input[name] or input[type=password].
rca of the issue: Two backend 500s fixed: (1) Motor's insert_one() mutates the dict argument to include the generated _id (ObjectId), which FastAPI's default encoder cannot serialize -> 500 on every _crud POST. Root cause: not popping _id before returning. Repro: POST /api/admin/testimonials with valid payload. Mitigation: doc.pop('_id', None) after insert. (2) Course.slug & Blog.slug were `str` (required) but the create handler generates slug only after Pydantic validation, so any POST without explicit slug hit a Pydantic ValidationError. Repro: POST /api/admin/courses body={"title": "X"}. Mitigation: default slug to '' in the models. Both fixed and verified via pytest.
